PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Su Yun Kuo, in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that we are here on a petition to probate a will regarding real property in California, that there is a question as to appointing Ms. Kuo without counsel, confirmed that she intends to sell the property, stated that there are potential claims outstanding and asked Ms. Kuo if she understood what the next steps are. Ms. Kuo responded that she will get an appraisal, transfer the title, pay off the mortgage and that she expects the proceeds to be $815,000.00 from the sale. The Court stated that we do not have a proposed order, that the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary will be under submission pending the order and that a bond in the amount of $67,000.00 should be provided for in the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
